notes: Non-skippable in-stream ads play before, during, or after other videos. Users do not have the option to skip the ad. Under auction buying, the 'Non-skippable reach' subtype uses 15-second non-skippable in-stream ads. Under reservation buying, non-skippable in-stream ads are described as 'up to 30 seconds long'. The table in the source also indicates a 'Max 15-20 seconds' range. The source does not specify file types, file size, or detailed copy character limits for this format.
